title: Concordia High goes down fighting
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The hard-working high...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The hard-working high school soccer team Concordia High fell short when they went down 0(3)-0(2) against Murray High School in the second semi-final of the Imizamo Yethu High School Sports Festival.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The hard-working high school soccer team Concordia High fell short when they went down 0(3)-0(2) against Murray High School in the second semi-final of the Imizamo Yethu High School Sports Festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game was played at the Thembalethu Stadium in George on Saturday evening, 17 May.","html":"The game was played at the Thembalethu Stadium in George on Saturday evening, 17 May."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Aphelele Higa (Concordia High) gave a solid performance throughout the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In their first game, Concordia High defeated Thembalethu High 2-1 and in the second game they beat Hillcrest High (Mossel Bay) 1-0 in a nail-biting encounter.","html":"In their first game, Concordia High defeated Thembalethu High 2-1 and in the second game they beat Hillcrest High (Mossel Bay) 1-0 in a nail-biting encounter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite a promising start, the Knysna school faltered in the face of continuous pressure from Murray High.","html":"Despite a promising start, the Knysna school faltered in the face of continuous pressure from Murray High."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lakhiwe Menze was creating havoc among the Concordia High back line. Both teams were playing the ball on the ground.","html":"Lakhiwe Menze was creating havoc among the Concordia High back line. Both teams were playing the ball on the ground."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No goals were scored in the first half, both sides having failed to convert some clear-cut chances during the first 15 minutes.","html":"No goals were scored in the first half, both sides having failed to convert some clear-cut chances during the first 15 minutes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Concordia High School soccer team before their game. Photo: Zama Gagu","html":"The Concordia High School soccer team before their game. Photo: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With everything to prove, both teams came on strong in the second half using their ball-handling skills to get into the box."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two Murray High players who also play in the ABC Motsepe Provincial League, Lakhiwe Menze and Ikho Ntsuntsu, were applying their superior experience to beat back the Concordia team.","html":"Two Murray High players who also play in the ABC Motsepe Provincial League, Lakhiwe Menze and Ikho Ntsuntsu, were applying their superior experience to beat back the Concordia team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the final whistle blew, there was no score on the board and they went straight to the penalty shoot-outs to determine the winners.","html":"When the final whistle blew, there was no score on the board and they went straight to the penalty shoot-outs to determine the winners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
